summary: Carlo Ancelotti's Brazil in a traditional 4-3-3 with a fluid front line — perhaps the most exciting group since 2014. Endrick needs to be let off the leash.
style: Traditional 4-3-3 under Ancelotti — fluid front three combining to create, fullbacks high & wide, structured 'deeper' and countering at speed.

counterReliance.note: Can control, but structured deeper and counters at speed

keyPlayers.name: Endrick
keyPlayers.note: 19yo maverick — pace, power & skill; 16 goal involvements at Lyon in 2026

tactics: Front three roam and combine while fullbacks stretch the pitch; they can sit a touch deeper and break at pace. Loaded with talent and Neymar back in the squad, but the author wants Endrick unleashed.
notes: Neymar Jr's return adds to a deep, talented squad.
sources: John Walker (@johnwalker_1986) — pre-tournament tactical scouting, May–Jun 2026
